accepted.rule_type: D: bounded lattice extraction and 3x3 colour recovery

rejected.rule_type: B: oriented laser head and edge ray
rejected.reason: The exact baseline is not generator-sound. A complete four-orientation head detector and ray renderer cannot be introduced below this tensor-network cost without accepting known failures.
The exact baseline is not generator-sound. The full rule needs background inference, rectangle bounds, dot alignment, and directional clipping; no honest rebuild fit below 271.

All six shared CP lanes are semantically necessary. F is rank five per period case but its two cases do not admit a cheaper shared factorization, and runtime generation of the zero-padded spatial basis costs more memory than it saves in parameters.

Rejected for runtime safety. The exact model can pass with ORT graph optimizations disabled, but default ORT fails with a MaxPool allocator mismatch ({1,1,1,1} != {1,10,1,1}); no candidate derived from this hidden-shape contract was accepted.

rejected.rule_type: B: paired portal and horizontal ray projection
rejected.reason: The exact baseline is not generator-sound. A complete portal-side, portal-span, marker-offset, and flip-aware renderer cannot beat the existing approximate cost.

rejected.rule_type: A: one-dimensional run compression with orientation
rejected.reason: The exact baseline is already the sound 208-memory/61-parameter rebuild. Its convolution kernel has 27 nonzeros, but ONNX full shape inference rejects a sparse Conv weight as unsupported; factoring it densely materializes a 30x30 intermediate and is more expensive.
